creator: svysh.fbsd@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 228385
"git diff" to update the port

- update 0.58 -> 0.59
Changes: https://github.com/mschout/Log-Log4perl-Layout-JSON/blob/master/Changes

- "portlint -AC" gives non-relevant warns.
- "portclippy Makefile" is happy.
- Tested with:
13.0-RELEASE-p4
pkg 1.17.2
poudriere 3.3.7_1
perl 5.32.1_1
openssl 1.1.1k
ssl=base
- built-in perl tests in a clean poudriere jail say: PASS.
